report.summary: Standup v14: Publish-v6 emptied PUBLISH_QUEUE (4 pages promoted, Day 43), build-v11 shipped Sui Blockchain + On-Chain Analytics guides (now sole 2 items in queue), design-v10 fixed mobile UX on Sentiment Heatmap + Token Radar + created 3 missing OG images, community-v26 drafted Stablecoin Yield + DeFAI social campaigns + FOMC T-2 Week Ahead tweet. Rate limiter STILL 0/6 — 8th consecutive cycle flagged. FOMC is Wednesday. git index.lock blocking commits.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v13
items: Publish-v6 promoted 4 pages (advanced-defi-strategies, news, crypto-inheritance-planning, parallel-evm-guide) — PUBLISH_QUEUE was emptied to 0 items. Vercel redeploy triggered (3HTgApFHX). Git commit blocked by index.lock.

Build-v11 shipped 2 new guides: Sui Blockchain Guide (~3,000 words, $600M TVL, Move language, 297K TPS) + On-Chain Analytics Guide (~3,500 words, MVRV Z-Score, SOPR, exchange flows, 4-layer framework). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE — queue now at 2 items.

Design-v10 fixed mobile UX: Sentiment Heatmap filter dropdowns converted from hover to click-based (fixes touch devices), added WCAG touch targets (44px), fixed tooltip viewport overflow. Token Radar got tab accessibility (role=tablist, aria-selected, mobile scroll). Created 3 missing OG images (Sui, On-Chain Analytics, Prediction Markets) + 3 PNG conversions.

Community-v26 drafted social: Stablecoin Yield Strategies thread (5 posts, Thu Mar 27) + DeFAI Guide thread (5 posts, Fri Mar 28) + Week Ahead anchor tweet (Mon Mar 16 PM, FOMC T-2 + tax 30d + Pectra 25d) + Pectra 25-day countdown (Tue Mar 17). 2 new social cards created. Calendar filled through Fri Mar 28.

EOD-v12 confirmed: 353 total published slugs, 251 have page.tsx (102 missing, 28.9%). 0 regressions. 6/6 API routes structurally healthy. 4 commits today (market-recap fix, 4-page split, WhaleWatchClient, Day 42 publish).
Total PUBLISHED_PAGES: ~475 (per publish-v6 report). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (sui-blockchain-guide, on-chain-analytics-guide).

Top content signals: Tax guide +90% (30 days to Apr 15), Pectra +91% (25 days to Apr 10), ETF tracker +91% (unique positioning), Stablecoin Yield +92% (pre-FOMC yield appetite), DeFAI +89% (AI×DeFi narrative).
git index.lock present — blocking new commits. Day 43 publish commit not yet pushed. 425 modified files in working tree.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ publish-v6 — Emptied PUBLISH_QUEUE: 4 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (Day 43). Vercel redeploy triggered.
SHIPPED ✅ build-v11 — Sui Blockchain Guide + On-Chain Analytics Guide researched, written, SEO-optimized, scaffolded, added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ design-v10 — Mobile UX fixes (Sentiment Heatmap click dropdowns, Token Radar tab a11y), 3 OG images + 3 PNG conversions, tooltip viewport fix.
SHIPPED ✅ community-v26 — Stablecoin Yield + DeFAI social campaigns, Week Ahead tweet, Pectra countdown, 2 social cards, newsletter amendments, calendar through Mar 28.
SHIPPED ✅ eod-v12 — Full QA pass. 0 regressions. 6/6 API routes healthy.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Rate limiter: 0/6 public API routes protected. FOMC is Wed Mar 18 (T-2). 8th consecutive cycle flagged.
BLOCKER 🔴 git index.lock — blocking all commits. Day 43 publish not committed. 425 modified files in working tree stuck.
BLOCKER 🔴 Staged next.config.ts drops output:'standalone' — still unresolved from v13.
BLOCKER 🔴 Staged deletions: badges/page.tsx + courses/page.tsx + courses/[slug]/page.tsx — Jefe approval needed.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 102/353 published slugs missing page.tsx (~29% returning 404).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 4/6 API routes lack fallback data (defi-yields, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial ~6 days remaining — Jefe: add payment method.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 next lint misconfigured (looking for ./lint directory).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Fix git index.lock + wire rate limiter (CRITICAL — T-2 to FOMC). Two steps: (1) Remove index.lock so commits flow again; (2) Import checkRateLimit() into all 6 public API routes (/api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed). FOMC Wednesday means potential traffic spike on unprotected endpoints. 8th consecutive cycle flagged. Assign: degen-programmer.

PRIORITY 2 — Commit Day 43 publish + resolve staged git blockers. Once index.lock is cleared: (1) Commit the publish-v6 changes (4 pages promoted); (2) git restore --staged next.config.ts to preserve output:'standalone'; (3) Confirm badges/courses deletions with Jefe or restore them; (4) Resolve middleware.ts merge conflict. This unlocks 425 modified files. Assign: degen-programmer + Jefe approval.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote sui-blockchain-guide + on-chain-analytics-guide from PUBLISH_QUEUE. Both have OG images (design-v10), research complete (build-v11). Queue goes to 0 after promotion. Simultaneously add fallback data to 4 unprotected API routes. Assign: degen-publish-queue + degen-data-engineer.

STRATEGIC NOTE — PUBLISH_QUEUE at 2 items after build-v11. Content velocity is strong (2 guides/cycle) but queue will be empty after next promotion. Three converging traffic catalysts: FOMC (Wed Mar 18, T-2), Tax season (Apr 15, 30 days), Ethereum Pectra (Apr 10, 25 days). Rate limiter + git lock must resolve before Wednesday. Next build candidates: Solana vs Ethereum 2026, MEV Guide 2026, DeFi Insurance deep-dive, or Crypto ETF Comparison. Community calendar filled through Mar 28 — social pipeline healthy.
